INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Привет'), ('你好'), ('こんにちは'), ('مرحبا'), (''), ('a');
SELECT leftUTF8(s, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE length(s) > 0;
SELECT leftUTF8(s, 4) FROM test_strings WHERE s IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT leftUTF8(s, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE length(s) > 0) AS substrings;
SELECT ts.s, leftUTF8(ts.s, 3) AS substr FROM (SELECT s FROM test_strings) AS ts;
SELECT leftUTF8(t1.s, 4) FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON length(t1.s) = length(t2.s);
SELECT ts.s, leftUTF8(ts.s, 4) AS substr FROM (SELECT s FROM test_strings WHERE length(s) > 3) AS ts;
SELECT leftUTF8(s, -1) FROM test_strings WHERE length(s) > 0 UNION ALL SELECT leftUTF8(s, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE length(s) > 0;
SELECT leftUTF8(s, 2) AS front_two FROM (SELECT s FROM test_strings WHERE s LIKE 'П%') AS sub;
SELECT leftUTF8(s, 4) AS left_part FROM (SELECT s FROM test_strings WHERE s NOT LIKE 'a') AS subqry;
